## Description

<!-- Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

<!-- Please delete options that are not relevant. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## Testing Performed

<!-- Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce. -->

- [ ] Tested on Windows
- [ ] Tested on macOS
- [ ] Tested on Linux

## Checklist:

<!-- Please check all the boxes that apply. -->

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (no magic strings, split into smaller files, etc.)
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] My commit messages are clear, descriptive, and follow the project conventions
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (including JSDoc for generic functions)
- [ ] There are no new console errors or warnings
- [ ] Dark mode works correctly (if UI changes were made)
- [ ] All window controls (minimize, maximize, close) work properly (if UI changes were made)
- [ ] I have checked that reusable code was moved to the `utils/` or `services/` directory
